name: code-critic
description: Adversarial code review of a local diff or a GitHub PR. A high-reasoning orchestrator (or the advisor) does the review, then delegates ALL GitHub and outbound-git actions to a Haiku critic-worker. It reviews AND acts — fixes locally, or posts inline review comments on the PR. Companion to resolve-pr-comments (which resolves reviewer comments; this one authors the review).

github_pat.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
github_pat.description: Dedicated PAT for code-critic's Haiku critic-worker. Fine-grained scopes: Metadata = Read, Pull requests = Read & write (read the diff + post review comments), Contents = Read (check out the PR branch into a worktree). Stored in your OS keychain — never in settings.json or a shared env var. This is separate from resolve-pr-comments' PAT; you set it once per plugin.
